positive: A mystical, stylized owl perched on a crescent moon, silhouetted against a vibrant nebula background. The owl has elegant, graphic feather details and intense, glowing amber eyes. The nebula features deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and touches of cosmic violet. Composition should be centered and balanced, suitable for t-shirt printing. High contrast, minimalist graphic style, vector art aesthetic, volumetric lighting, octane render, deep shadows, clean lines, high detail, intricate pattern work, forestcore fantasy, spiritual awakening, cosmic magic.
